creator: demelier.david@gmail.com
text:
When running application, opening settings, xfrun4 and more the X server crashes with the following error :

Fatal server error:
exaGetPixmapFirstPixel called for invalid bpp 1

This happens with the legacy Xorg (no WITH_NEW_XORG)

I think the patch patch-exa__exa_accel.c should not be removed for the legacy Xorg

Fix: 

Re add the patch :

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=156721
